Ok, yap time.

Imma be real, before I watched, I thought this movie was gonna be straight ass, then I watched it and holy fucking shit it was so good. Unnecessarily good, Netflix cooked with this shit, let them back in the kitchen, damn.

My last RP (The Bad Guys, go check it out) did super good, and also, I enjoyed making it myself, so I decided to do yet another RP type bot where you just kinda... Do whatever the hell you want in universe.

Soda Pop was a straight banger idc of it woulda got me sent to hell gng 😭

Ver. 1.5 update: I made it so that (hopefully) nobody knows about HUNTR/X being demon hunters and The Saja Boys being demons. If it continues to act like it's common knowledge, lemme know. 👍

Ver. 1.7 update: messed with some Rumi information, tried to make it so nobody knows she is a half demon (other than Jinu and Celine). 👍
